overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game follows a character with distinctive cybernetic spine implants along a futuristic waterfront promenade. The character walks from an open waterfront area with towering neon-lit buildings into a covered traditional Japanese-style walkway lined with vending machines.

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a close-up of a digital billboard before panning right to reveal a futuristic waterfront cityscape. The camera moves along a concrete promenade beside a canal, with towering cyberpunk buildings in the background. At the end of the segment, a character with cybernetic spine implants enters from the left.

street with moving vehicles separated from the walkway by metal bollards

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open waterfront promenade with the canal on the left and traffic on the right. The traditional Japanese gate looms larger ahead as the character approaches. A pedestrian in a yellow dress passes by walking in the opposite direction, and a red vending machine becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered traditional walkway with vending machines and purple neon lighting

events.description: character enters the covered Japanese-style walkway passing under the traditional roof structure
passing under purple neon tube lights illuminating the interior of the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade passing various pedestrians and examining the vending machines

notable_agents.action: man in gray leather jacket walking ahead near the vending machines

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden roof with curved eaves supported by dark pillars, creating a covered arcade
green automated vending machine with BURRITO branding and skull graphic design
futuristic blue benches lined against the walkway wall
purple fluorescent tube lights running along the ceiling of the covered walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters the covered walkway passing under the traditional Japanese gate structure. Inside, the space is sheltered with a wooden roof and illuminated by purple neon lights. Various vending machines line the left side, including a prominent green one advertising burritos, while other pedestrians walk ahead through the arcade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an expansive, neon-lit cyberpunk waterfront into a sheltered, traditional Japanese-style arcade. It begins with a close-up of a digital billboard before panning right to reveal a concrete promenade beside a canal, where a character with cybernetic spine implants enters the frame. As the character walks forward, the open cityscape with its towering buildings and passing pedestrians gives way to a looming traditional Japanese gate. The scene then shifts as the camera follows the character under the gate and into a covered walkway, where the open sky is replaced by a wooden roof and purple neon illumination. Finally, the environment narrows into a sheltered corridor lined with colorful vending machines and other pedestrians moving through the arcade.
